## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`ruff check`)
- [ ] Type checking passes (`mypy`)
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Commit messages reference the issue (`fixes #N` or `refs #N`)
